name: plan-keeper
description: Three skills for organizing markdown plans in ~/plans/<repo>/. plan-save captures the latest plan from a conversation; plan-do lists and routes a saved plan to the right next superpowers/harness skill based on its shape (idea / spec / sequential impl plan / task-list-shaped); plan-done archives a completed plan into ~/plans/<repo>/done/ with a completion stamp. Backed by a bundled plan_keeper_cli.py that handles the I/O, naming, and atomic-write mutation. Includes a PreToolUse hook that auto-approves invocations of the bundled CLI so each skill flow runs without per-call permission prompts.
